title: Feature: Self-Sufficient hex-agent with TUI — OpenRouter-powered development pipeline
description: Make hex-agent a complete AAIDE by adding an inference client, prompt templates, and a ratatui TUI that drives the full pipeline (ADR → Workplan → Swarm → Code → Validate) using OpenRouter as the primary provider.

phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Inference client and prompt templates — the engine that powers everything

phases.name: TUI Shell
phases.description: ratatui scaffold with pipeline bar, task list, status, and keyboard controls

phases.name: Pipeline Phases
phases.description: Each phase of the dev pipeline wired into hex dev

phases.name: Polish
phases.description: Session persistence, modes, RL integration, cost tracking

steps.description: Add inference client to hex-agent that calls hex-nexus POST /api/chat/completions. Supports streaming and non-streaming responses. Handles OpenRouter-specific response fields (usage.cost). Reuses existing OpenAiCompatAdapter wire protocol.

Create prompt templates in hex-cli/assets/prompts/ with {{placeholder}} expansion. Templates: adr-generate.md, workplan-generate.md, code-generate.md, test-generate.md, fix-violations.md. Template engine reads templates via rust-embed, expands placeholders from hex context (ADRs, architecture summary, port interfaces, AST summaries).

Add ratatui dependency to hex-cli. Scaffold hex dev command with TUI: pipeline progress bar (ADR → Plan → Code → Validate → Commit), task list panel with live status, status bar (model, cost, tokens, budget), keyboard controls (a/e/r/m/p/q/d/l). Alternate screen mode with clean exit.

ADR generation phase. hex-agent assembles context (existing ADRs for style, hex analyze summary, related ADRs by keyword), fills adr-generate.md template, calls inference via OpenRouter (task type: reasoning, default model: deepseek-r1), writes result to docs/adrs/. TUI shows gate: user approves, edits in $EDITOR, or skips.

Workplan generation phase. hex-agent assembles context (ADR content, workplan JSON schema, hex architecture rules, dependency tier definitions), fills workplan-generate.md template, calls inference (task type: structured_output, default model: llama-4-maverick). Validates response against workplan schema. Writes to docs/workplans/. TUI gate for approval.
Auto swarm initialization. Creates HexFlo swarm from workplan name, creates one task per workplan step. No inference needed — pure coordination. TUI updates pipeline bar to show swarm phase complete.

Code generation phase. For each workplan step: hex-agent assembles context (step description, target file AST summary via hex summarize, port interfaces, hex boundary rules), fills code-generate.md template, calls inference (task type: code_generation, default model: llama-4-maverick). Writes file to disk. TUI shows diff per step with approve/edit/retry gate. Marks HexFlo task complete on approval.

Validation phase. Runs hex analyze on modified files, checks architecture boundaries, reports violations. If violations found: fills fix-violations.md template, calls inference to auto-fix, shows fix diff. TUI gate: user approves fixes or edits manually.

Session persistence. Save dev session state to ~/.hex/sessions/dev-<timestamp>.json: current phase, step, generated artifacts, completed diffs, cost accumulator, model selections. Implement hex dev --resume, hex dev --list, hex dev --clean.

Add --quick, --auto, --dry-run modes. Quick: skip ADR + workplan gates. Auto: skip all gates (for CI/batch). Dry-run: show prompt, model, estimated tokens/cost without calling inference. Wire mode flags into hex dev command and pipeline phases.

Wire RL task type selection for each pipeline phase. Register task types (reasoning, structured_output, code_generation, code_edit) with the RL engine. Pass task type when calling inference so RL engine picks the best OpenRouter model. Feed back hex analyze pass/fail as reward signal.

Cost tracking in TUI status bar. Show running cost, token count, current model, budget remaining. Read OpenRouter actual cost from inference response. Implement --budget flag that pauses pipeline if cost exceeds limit. Persist cost per session for history.
